title: erysimum irio
intro: Erysimum irio, also known as the sea rocket or rose cress, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Erysimum irio include its ability to aid in digestion and reduce symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Erysimum irio is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application for its medicinal properties.
